prompt: Adopt "publish-after-commit" as the default producer convention (events fire only after the state-write transaction commits, and are dropped on rollback), with the existing dep-unblock in-transaction cascade as the one documented exception?

Does the `PrReconcileRequested` topic + merge-poller targeted single-PR reconcile belong to THIS event-bus project, rather than to P856 (PR/CI/conflict state reconciliation)? A 'no' means we drop tasks touching that seam and defer them to P856.
How should the bus rollout be gated so a regression can be reverted instantly?
choices: Per-loop feature flags (each converted loop independently toggleable) — most granular, recommended
No flag; rely on the retained sweep backstop alone
